meaning: n.稳定器,安定装置,水平尾翼
examples: The plant functions as a stabilizer and a sediment trap and as a nursery area for estuarine fish and shellfish.
It was made of aluminum tubing, Mylar and piano wire, with a weird horizontal stabilizer poking from the front like the head of a stork.
Ball nut, a fixed spherical nut driven by the jackscrew for flap and stabilizer movement.
Moreover, in a few situations, NATO really plays a role of a stabilizer of world affairs.
Image stability is doubly assured with both Advanced Image Stabilizer and Optical Image Stabilizer.
